title: Phone 3a Pro camera focus keeps hunting in low light
summary: Autofocus fails in night mode and videos are shaky.
content: After the latest update, camera focus keeps hunting in low light. Video stabilization is unstable and results are blurry.
author: demo_user_1

title: 希望相机增加更快的人像抓拍
summary: 人像模式出片慢，建议增加快速抓拍开关。
content: Phone 2a 在人像模式下等待时间较长，希望增加快速抓拍选项，提升人像体验。
author: demo_user_2

title: Target OS battery widget is cool
summary: I like the new battery widget.
content: No imaging topic here, just a UI compliment.
author: demo_user_3
